# V60 — Ask GoalOS Autonomous Question Router

V60 adds a browser-local question window and full Ask GoalOS route. It answers public-site questions from static route/doctrine data and routes users to the correct page.

## Added

- `ask-goalos.html`
- global Ask GoalOS floating question window
- local route/intention engine
- `data/ask-goalos-routing.json`
- `schemas/ask-goalos-routing.schema.json`
- tests and post-build kernel
- v60 route manifest with 66 public routes

## Not added

No server chatbot, no LLM API, no account, no telemetry, no browser storage, no wallet, no token action, no production authority.
